title: Vanilla Smoke Argentinian Dates Pudding
description: This decadent date-night dish combines the rich flavors of fermented dates with a subtle hint of smoke and creamy vanilla to create a light, indulgent vegetarian-friendly dessert.
instructions: Rinse and pit the dates. Place them in a mixing bowl.
Add almond milk, coconut cream, vanilla extract, optional vanilla bean puree, unsweetened cocoa powder, and sugar. Mix well with hands or wooden spoon until the mixture is smooth and sticky.

Transfer the mixture into a shallow dish and place it in a preheated oven at 200°C for about 45 minutes to an hour until the outside turns golden brown and crispy, while keeping the inside soft and moist. Alternatively, use a deep fryer or air fryer for similar results.
Serve immediately with whipped cream or coconut ice cream on top.
